summary: Phase 1c UI/UX Refactor Testing Complete - All hub pages, tab navigation, sidebar consolidation, and regression tests passed successfully

minor_issues.issue: 2 console 404 errors for missing assets during navigation
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, likely missing static assets

passed_tests: Portal selector displays all 8 portals (Finance, Admin, Owner, Executive, Outlet, Procurement, Inventory, HR)
Finance Payments Hub - 8 tabs (payment-requests, ap-aging, payments, payment-runs, run-templates, bank-recon, ar-invoices, deposits) - All tabs load with correct URL params (?tab=<id>)
Finance Tax Hub - 3 tabs (tax, efaktur, ebupot) - All tabs navigate correctly
Finance Budget Hub - 3 tabs (vs-actual, manage, forecasting) - Budget vs Actual shows P&L/COA data
Finance Period Closing - 4-phase workflow page loads correctly
Admin Loyalty Hub - 5 tabs (overview, customers, rewards, redemptions, analytics) - Overview shows 251 customers with tier distribution and points data

Admin Operations Hub - 8 tabs including 3 NEW pages (Laporan Terjadwal at /admin/operations/report-schedules, Manajemen Data at /admin/operations/data-management, Tour Analytics at /admin/operations/tour-analytics) - All render content correctly
Admin User Management Hub - 3 tabs (users, roles, audit-log) - All Users tab shows user table
Admin Setup Hub - 3 tabs (number-series, tax-config, bulk-import) - Number Series shows numbering cards
Sidebar consolidation verified - Finance sidebar: 8 sections (≤12 target), Admin sidebar: 9 sections (≤12 target)
Tab navigation updates URL with ?tab=<id> parameter correctly across all hub pages
Content renders after async data load (6-second wait implemented as per agent instructions)
Empty states display properly (e.g., 'Belum ada Payment Request', 'Belum ada data') - NOT blank screens
Regression test - All 6 other portals (Owner, Executive, Outlet, Procurement, Inventory, HR) navigate and load successfully
No red error overlays or console page errors detected during navigation
Aurora glassmorphism theme applied consistently across all tested pages

login_and_auth.details: Login with admin@torado.id / Torado@2026 successful, token stored in localStorage as aurora_access_token, redirects to /portal-select

portal_selector.details: All 8 portals visible and accessible (Finance, Admin, Owner, Executive, Outlet, Procurement, Inventory, HR)

tabs: bank-recon (shows reconciliation UI with 1529 chars content)
ar-invoices (shows invoice list with 4430 chars content)
finance_payments_hub.content_rendering: All tabs render content or appropriate empty states after 6-second async wait

finance_budget_hub.notes: 2 minor 404 console errors for missing assets (non-critical)

finance_period_closing.details: 4-phase workflow page (Periods, Anomaly, Wizard, Lock) renders correctly

tabs: overview (shows 251 customers, 742,189 total points, 75,322 points earned in 30 days, tier distribution: Bronze 56/22%, Silver 153/61%, Gold 42/17%)
admin_loyalty_hub.data_verification: Overview tab displays correct customer count (251) and points data as expected

admin_operations_hub.details: All 8 sub-pages including 3 NEW ones render content correctly without blank screens

sidebar_consolidation.details: Both Finance and Admin sidebars meet the consolidation target. Flattened single-item sections render as direct links (no collapsible chevron).

regression_other_portals.details: All 6 other portals navigate and load successfully without errors

console_errors.console_warnings: Minor 404s for missing assets in Budget Hub (non-critical)
console_errors.details: No red error overlays, no 'is not defined' errors, no import errors during navigation

testing_notes: All hub pages use URL param ?tab=<id> for tab navigation as designed
Content loads asynchronously - 6-second wait implemented before checking for blank screens
Empty states (e.g., 'Belum ada data', 'Belum ada Payment Request') are NOT bugs - they are proper empty-state cards with headings
Only TRUE blank screens (zero visible text in <main>) or red error overlays should be reported as bugs
Aurora glassmorphism theme is consistently applied across all tested pages
Token stored in localStorage as aurora_access_token (not the default token key)
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for hub pages and tabs (e.g., payments-tab-<id>, loyalty-tab-<id>, user-mgmt-tab-<id>, setup-tab-<id>)
Sidebar uses leaf-only active model - parent sections do NOT have background highlight when child is active (prevents double-active bug)
Single-item sections are flattened into direct links without collapsible chevrons (e.g., Period Closing, System Settings)
